title: 9ft Banner Happy 80th Birthday Sparkling Fizz White & Rose Gold Holographic Foil Pennant – Stunning Dazzling Party Decor for a Memorable Milestone
features: FOR A BIG DAY -- Jazz your home for a big day!
INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE -- Made of durable long-lasting material this banner can be used both indoors and outdoors.
EYE-CATCHING -- Bold, glittering design stands out beautifully, making it a dazzling centerpiece for any celebration.
EASY TO USE -- Just unfold and display in seconds.
Package contents: 9ft Banner Happy 80th Birthday Sparkling Fizz White & Rose Gold Age 80 x1, Envelope x1. Actual packaging may vary. The real color may be slightly different from the pictures.
description: This 9ft rose gold banner is perfect for the 80th birthday party. It can be used both indoors and outdoors as the material is strong and durable. This rose gold banner is designed for effortless decoration and can be effortlessly displayed on walls, doors, or tabletops. Kindly note that items may slightly vary from the image. The banner is supplied in an envelope. This product is subject to specific safety warnings: Not suitable for children under 14 years. To be used under the direct supervision of an adult.
